For You, Tala
In a world full of noise, your laughter is my favorite sound.

In a world full of faces, yours is the one I search for in every room.

You are not just my girlfriend — you are my home, my peace, and my greatest adventure.

Today, tomorrow, and every day after — it will always be you.
— Forever yours 💛

A Letter From My Heart
My Dearest Tala
To the woman who made my world bloom — Today & Always

If I could gather all the words in every language ever spoken, they still wouldn't be enough to describe what you mean to me. You came into my life like the first morning of spring — quietly, gently, and then suddenly everything looked different.

You are the kind of rare that poets spend lifetimes searching for. The way you laugh at your own jokes before finishing them. The way you care so deeply for everyone around you. The way you light up when you talk about the things you love — I could watch you be yourself forever and never grow tired.

This birthday, I want you to know that loving you is not something I do — it is something I am. It lives in every part of me. And I am so endlessly grateful that of all the paths in this world, yours crossed mine.

Today, we celebrate you. Not just your birthday — but you. Every impossible thing you've overcome. Every beautiful thing you've become. The future still unwritten, and everything wonderful it holds for us.

Happy Birthday, my love. Today is yours. 🌸

— Yours, always & completely 💛
💌
Our Story
The Moments That Made Us
THE BEGINNING
The Day Everything Changed
Before I knew it, you were already the best part of my day. There was something about you — your smile, your energy — that made the world feel brighter.
🌱
FEBRUARY 3 — OUR ANNIVERSARY
The Day We Made It Official 💞
A date I will remember for the rest of my life — because that was the day I became the luckiest person in the world.
💞
OUR ADVENTURES
Every Place We Explored
Every trip, every sunset, every laugh shared in places new and familiar. With you, every destination becomes a memory worth keeping forever.
✈️
THE HARD DAYS
When We Held On
The days that tested us only made us stronger. You showed me what it means to love through the storms — steady, present, and real.
🌧️
TODAY — MAY 16, 2026
Your Birthday 🎂
A celebration of you. Of us. Of everything we've built together and everything still waiting ahead. The story is still being written — and I can't wait for every page.
🎂
Our Moments
You, In Full Bloom
Tala & the White Peonies 🌸
Golden Hour Together 🌅
She Blooms Wherever She Stands 🌺
My Rose Among Roses 🥀
From My Heart
Why I Love You
01
😂
The Way You Laugh
Your laugh is the most genuine, contagious sound in the world. When you find something truly funny, you give in completely — and I fall in love with you all over again every single time.
02
💛
Your Kindness
The way you care for people — deeply, quietly, without needing recognition. It is one of the most beautiful things about you. Your heart is enormous.
03
✨
Your Strength
You carry yourself with a grace that takes my breath away. You face life with courage — even when it is hard — and that inspires me every single day.
04
🌸
How You Make Me Feel
With you, I feel understood. Chosen. At home. You make me want to be better — not because you ask me to, but because you deserve the very best version of me.
05
🌍
Your Curiosity
You approach life with wonder. New places, new experiences, new ideas — your excitement for this world makes every day feel like an adventure I get to share.
06
🤝
My Best Friend
Beyond everything, you are my person. The one I call first with good news and bad. The one who knows me completely — and still chooses to stay.
What Awaits Us
Our Future Plans

Every dream I have — you are in all of them.

💍
SOON · FOREVER
Our Wedding Day
A celebration of us — under string lights and starlight, surrounded by peonies and the people we love most. You in your dress. Me, completely speechless. Our first dance. The very beginning of forever.
🏡
OUR HOME
A Place Called Ours
A home that smells like your coffee and my cooking — mismatched but perfect. A balcony with flowers you chose, rooms filled with laughter, and walls that quietly hold our whole story.
✈️
THE WORLD · OUR PLAYGROUND
Traveling Together
Sunsets over Paris. Mornings in Istanbul. Getting lost in Tokyo. The Maldives — just us, the ocean, and nowhere to be. We will collect experiences, not just places.
👨‍👩‍👧
IN TIME
Our Little Family
Little hands and big laughs. A child with your eyes and your smile — and my luckiest day ever. I cannot wait to build this life with you.
🌱
EVERY DAY
Growing Together
Supporting each other's dreams without condition. Growing into who we're meant to be — side by side. Choosing each other on the easy days and the hard ones.
🥂
DECADES FROM NOW
Growing Old Together
Still laughing at the same jokes. Still holding hands. Still choosing each other. Looking back at a life so beautifully lived — knowing we did it right, because we did it together.
The Chapter I Dream Of
Our Wedding Story
💍
"I want to marry you in the golden hour,
when the light is soft and the world holds its breath.
I want to look at you and know —
this is exactly where I was always going.

I want our wedding to feel like coming home.
Flowers in every corner. Your hand in mine.
The people who love us, laughing and crying.
And me — completely undone by you."
🌸
Peonies everywhere
🕯️
Candlelit ceremony
💫
Under the stars
💛
Gold & rose tones
🎶
Our favorite songs
∞
Forever & always
✦   A Universe Made For You   ✦
Aurora
of Love
Every color painted in the northern sky
is a feeling I cannot put into words — only feel
when I am with you.

"She is the poetry I never knew how to write —
and the answer to questions I had not thought to ask."

Just For You
Our Little Quiz

How well do you know us? 🌸

QUESTION 01 OF 07
🗓️ When is our anniversary — the date we made it official?
QUESTION 02 OF 07
💛 What do you love the most about me?
QUESTION 03 OF 07
🌟 What is your ambition for our relationship?
LOVE RIDDLE 01 OF 03
🌹 I have cities, but no houses live there.
I have mountains, but no trees grow.
I have water, but no fish swim.
And I hold the path to your heart.
What am I?
LOVE RIDDLE 02 OF 03
💫 I can fill a room without taking up space.
I can be broken without being touched.
I grow stronger the more it is shared.
And once given to you, it was never truly mine again.
What am I?
LOVE RIDDLE 03 OF 03
🌸 The more you take of me away,
the larger I become each day.
I am found between two people
who cannot bear to be apart.
What am I?
YOU MADE IT ✨
🎉
Tala, you are my favorite person to know.
Thank you for playing — and for being so perfectly you.
